# AS40271 — SFMIX IP Network

> Opt-in caching & content cooperative for local eyeball ISPs in the San Francisco Bay Area. Operated by SFMIX.

## About

AS40271 is a caching and content delivery cooperative run by SFMIX, an IRS 501(c)(12) Internet Exchange Point. Local eyeball ISPs peer with AS40271 and pull popular cacheable traffic — Google, Apple, Microsoft, Steam, Netskrt — directly off local caches instead of through transit providers.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://ip.sfmix.org/): Overview, content sources, and pricing
- [Connection Guide](https://ip.sfmix.org/connection-guide/): How to peer with AS40271
- [BGP Communities](https://ip.sfmix.org/bgp-communities/): BGP community reference for traffic engineering
- [Contact](https://ip.sfmix.org/contact/): How to reach us
- [Privacy](https://ip.sfmix.org/privacy/): Privacy policy

## Related

- [SFMIX (parent org)](https://sfmix.org): San Francisco Metropolitan Internet eXchange
- [PeeringDB](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/40271): AS40271 on PeeringDB
